title: cyphostemma waterlotii
intro: Cyphostemma waterlotii, also known as the 'living stone', is a succulent plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Cyphostemma waterlotii include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
